label: Plant properties
description: Properties for plant things covering growth, harvesting, sowing, wild generation, visual variants, and terrain requirements.

growDays.label: Grow days
growDays.description: Game days to reach full growth from a seed or cutting.

visualSizeRange.label: Visual size range
visualSizeRange.description: FloatRange controlling the random size multiplier applied to the plant graphic (min~max).

growMinGlow.label: Grow min glow
growMinGlow.description: Minimum light level (0–1) required for any growth to occur.

growOptimalGlow.label: Grow optimal glow
growOptimalGlow.description: Light level at which growth rate is maximised.

minFertility.label: Min fertility
minFertility.description: Minimum terrain fertility required for this plant to grow.

fertilitySensitivity.label: Fertility sensitivity
fertilitySensitivity.description: How strongly terrain fertility affects growth rate (0 = insensitive, 1 = linear).

harvestWork.label: Harvest work
harvestWork.description: Work ticks required to harvest this plant.

harvestYield.label: Harvest yield
harvestYield.description: Expected number of harvestedThingDef items produced from one plant.

harvestedThingDef.label: Harvested thing def
harvestedThingDef.description: ThingDef produced when this plant is harvested.

harvestTag.label: Harvest tag
harvestTag.description: String tag used by harvest designator logic to group plants of the same harvest type.

harvestYieldTag.label: Harvest yield tag
harvestYieldTag.description: String tag for identifying the type of yield (used by research and stats).

sowTags.label: Sow tags
sowTags.description: String tags controlling which grow zones or bills can sow this plant.

sowMinSkill.label: Sow min skill
sowMinSkill.description: Minimum Plants skill level required to sow this plant.

sowResearchPrerequisites.label: Sow research prerequisites
sowResearchPrerequisites.description: All listed ResearchProjectDefs must be completed before this plant can be sown.

wildClusterRadius.label: Wild cluster radius
wildClusterRadius.description: Radius in cells of wild clusters generated during map creation.

wildClusterWeight.label: Wild cluster weight
wildClusterWeight.description: Relative frequency weight for wild cluster generation on map gen.

wildOrder.label: Wild order
wildOrder.description: Generation order for wild plants; lower values generate first and block later entries.

wildEqualLocalDistribution.label: Wild equal local distribution
wildEqualLocalDistribution.description: If true, each tile gets an equal portion of this plant rather than clustering.

topWindExposure.label: Top wind exposure
topWindExposure.description: Factor controlling how strongly wind sway affects the top of this plant's graphic.

immatureGraphicPath.label: Immature graphic path
immatureGraphicPath.description: Texture path used when this plant is still growing (below full maturity).

leaflessGraphicPath.label: Leafless graphic path
leaflessGraphicPath.description: Texture path used during the cold/dormant season when the plant has shed its leaves.

cavePlant.label: Cave plant
cavePlant.description: If true, this plant can only grow in underground (cave) environments.

cavePlantWeight.label: Cave plant weight
cavePlantWeight.description: Relative frequency weight for cave generation.

neverBlightable.label: Never blightable
neverBlightable.description: If true, this plant is immune to blight events.

dieIfLeafless.label: Die if leafless
dieIfLeafless.description: If true, this plant dies when it enters the leafless (dormant) state.

reproduces.label: Reproduces
reproduces.description: Whether this plant can spread seeds to adjacent fertile cells.

reproductionRadius.label: Reproduction radius
reproductionRadius.description: Maximum radius in cells for seed dispersal when reproduces is true.

treeLoversCareIfChopped.label: Tree lovers care if chopped
treeLoversCareIfChopped.description: If true, chopping this plant triggers a mood penalty for tree-loving traits.

interferesWithRoof.label: Interferes with roof
interferesWithRoof.description: If true, this plant cannot grow under a constructed roof.

humanFoodPlant.label: Human food plant
humanFoodPlant.description: If true, colonists with plant-eating behaviors consider this plant edible.

maxMeshCount.label: Max mesh count
maxMeshCount.description: Maximum number of individual plant sprites drawn per cell at full density.

blockAdjacentSow.label: Block adjacent sow
blockAdjacentSow.description: If true, adjacent cells cannot be sown while this plant is present.

allowAutoCut.label: Allow auto-cut
allowAutoCut.description: Whether the auto-cut designation can target this plant.
